title: Chamber of Guf Info
wikitext:
[]: Chamber of Guf Info?             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Thu Jan 31, 2008 4:48 am My apologies, because I didn't know where exactly this would go. But since I wasn't aiming to necessarily discuss it, I posted it here.. I'm looking on information on the Chamber of Guf, but not necessarily as it's directly related (or mentioned in) NGE. Rather, I want to find out where the term came from, because my interweb searching has proven fruitless except for a few sentences that I already knew. Has anyone found any good information on this other than it was the "holding place for unborn souls" or whatever? Even if it's referenced from scriptures or whatever, I'll look into it. I just haven't found ANYTHING and I'm frustrated. XD
